name: delete_report_configs
short_description: Delete a set of existing configurable report objects
full_help:
delete_report_configs

Description: 
Delete a set of existing configurable report objects

Syntax: 
delete_report_configs  [-quiet] [-verbose] <report_configs>...

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <report_configs>  List of configurable report objects to delete

Categories: 
Object, Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
